description:
In the image, a man is sitting in a dimly lit room with a window that has a white curtain and a yellow drape. The man is wearing a yellow shirt and is positioned on the left side of the image. He is engaged with two objects: a laptop and a soda can. 

The laptop is placed on the right side of the image, and the soda can is located in front of it. The room has a dark ambiance, but there's an intriguing detail - the window is illuminated by an orange light that casts a soft glow within the room. This contrast between the brightly lit window and the darker surroundings creates a captivating visual effect.

Please note that this description is based on the visible content of the image and does not include any inferred or imagined details.
